release_notes:
Version 2.7.26 - Facebook Stabilization & Organic Warmup
🛡️ Facebook Stability:
- Organic Warmup Phase: Added initial feed interaction (scrolling and random likes) to establish session trust.
- Session Recovery: Added detection for "Login Banners" and automatic cookie re-injection to prevent redirects.
- Enhanced Monitoring: Added continuous session checks before each action block.

📈 Improvements:
- Improved error logging for better diagnostics of sudden bot stops.
- Refined navigation logic to handle redirects to login pages or checkpoints.
